purpose: Define the minimum authenticated evidence that proves routing from a parent to each child; this is not a synthetic success claim.
proof_requirements: The parent session records a successful collaboration.spawn_agent call with the listed agent_type and a returned canonical child task path.
The child session metadata names the parent thread and the same agent_type.
The child turn_context records the listed effective model and effort.
A child completion is recorded after its spawn; a route declaration or static TOML file alone is insufficient.
known_failed_pre_reload_state: Before this fresh Codex task/app process, three authenticated dispatch attempts reported unknown agent_type `switchloom_implementer`; no child was created. Preserve that as a host discovery/reload failure, not as evidence of a routing fallback.
